summary: Iteration 125: Backend-only testing of Modern Invoice PDF Generator. All 9 tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with new modern design (200, application/pdf), (2) PDF contains FATTURA, DESTINATARIO, TOTALE, IBAN, Scadenza Pagamento, (3) PDF consistency verified with second invoice, (4) Preventivi list API still returns commessa_stato enrichment, (5) Dossier generation still works (regression).

invoice_pdf_endpoint.result: PASS - Returns valid PDF with modern design

elements_present: FATTURA document type (spaced in PDF as 'F AT T U R A')
DESTINATARIO label for client section (no box borders)
Items table with Descrizione, Q.ta, Prezzo Unit., IVA, Importo
CONDIZIONI GENERALI DI VENDITA on page 2
invoice_pdf_modern_design_elements.result: PASS - All modern design elements present

invoice_pdf_consistency.result: PASS - Same modern design applied consistently

invoice_detail_endpoint.result: PASS - Returns invoice details including lines and totals

preventivi_enrichment_regression.evidence: PRV-2026-0033 returns commessa_stato=chiuso, PRV-2026-0045 returns commessa_stato=richiesta

dossier_regression.result: PASS - Dossier PDF generation still works

pdf_structure.page_1: Invoice main content with header, client (DESTINATARIO), items table, bank info (COORDINATE BANCARIE), totals (TOTALE), scadenza
pdf_structure.page_2: CONDIZIONI GENERALI DI VENDITA with signature blocks

design_highlights: Spacious client section WITHOUT box borders
Generous table padding with column widths
Bank info left / totals right layout
Prominent due date (Scadenza) near totals in blue box

critical_code_review_comments: pdf_invoice_modern.py: Clean implementation with modern CSS using Helvetica font
Invoice PDF correctly shows Scadenza Pagamento in prominent blue box near totals (lines 549-555 in pdf_invoice_modern.py)
DESTINATARIO section has no box borders - clean spacious design (lines 147-171)
Bank info positioned left, totals right in footer (lines 213-229)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 backend tests pass for modern invoice PDF generator. The new pdf_invoice_modern.py generates professional PDFs with Helvetica font, spacious DESTINATARIO section (no box), bank info left/totals right layout, and prominent Scadenza Pagamento in blue box near totals. Test invoice inv_fa3decf4d9f2 has due_date=2026-03-30 displayed as '30/03/2026'. Preventivi commessa_stato enrichment confirmed working.
